content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 3, 2026)
## OVERVIEW 
The day saw the opening of a new pull request focused on adding an agent starter, and a new issue was reported concerning a build failure on macOS related to Bun's postinstall script.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

No completed work to report for this period.

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
- **Feature Development**: A new pull request, [#6702](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6702), was opened to add an agent-like starter in the develop branch.

## CLOSED ISSUES

No issues were closed today.

## NEW ISSUES

- **Build Process Issues**: A new issue, [#6704](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6704), was reported regarding `elizaos create` failing on macOS with an error indicating "Bun's postinstall script was not run."

## ACTIVE ISSUES

No active issues with more than 3 comments to report.
